payload.goal: Agents emit compact validated JSON for every planning artefact; a local zero-upload viewer renders it richly.

phases.name: viewer
phases.goal: self-contained local viewer + component library + hyperflow view

phases.name: integration
phases.goal: wire the mode switch into skills + doctrine; leaner memory

payload.graph:
phase-1-contract -> phase-2-viewer
phase-1-contract -> phase-3-integration
phase-2 + phase-3 -> phase-4-contract-docs
